query:
SELECT 'products' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM products
UNION ALL SELECT 'station_tasks', COUNT(*) FROM station_tasks
UNION ALL SELECT 'station_events', COUNT(*) FROM station_events
UNION ALL SELECT 'sampling_results', COUNT(*) FROM sampling_results
UNION ALL SELECT 'productivity_score_details', COUNT(*) FROM productivity_score_details
UNION ALL SELECT 'engineer_daily_productivity', COUNT(*) FROM engineer_daily_productivity
UNION ALL SELECT 'support_task_compensations', COUNT(*) FROM support_task_compensations
UNION ALL SELECT 'sheet_sync_jobs', COUNT(*) FROM sheet_sync_jobs
UNION ALL SELECT 'import_batch_backups', COUNT(*) FROM import_batch_backups
UNION ALL SELECT 'purchase_order_deletion_logs', COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs
UNION ALL SELECT 'product_archives', COUNT(*) FROM product_archives
UNION ALL SELECT 'product_categories', COUNT(*) FROM product_categories
UNION ALL SELECT 'category_station_flows', COUNT(*) FROM category_station_flows
UNION ALL SELECT 'defect_options', COUNT(*) FROM defect_options
UNION ALL SELECT 'product_name_options', COUNT(*) FROM product_name_options
UNION ALL SELECT 'productivity_target_configs', COUNT(*) FROM productivity_target_configs
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users;
